title: GOESB Benchmark Pack
description: An immutable, hash-identified bundle of audio+transcripts+metadata used by a profile.

sha256.description: Hash over the canonical pack contents. Immutable after publication.

profile_id.description: The profile this pack is scored against.

license.description: SPDX id or explicit terms; required for open/community.

audio.description: How audio is referenced. For private packs the audio never leaves the machine.

source.description: Where to obtain the actual audio for open/community packs. Required for visibility=open|community; omitted for private packs (audio never leaves the machine).

type.description: Which built-in provider `goesb run` can use to auto-fetch this pack's audio. 'manual' (or omitted) means fetch_instructions is the only path.

params.description: Provider-specific parameters, e.g. {language, split} for fleurs; {speaker, chapter} for librispeech.

url.description: Upstream download location (e.g. Common Voice release page/API).

fetch_instructions.description: Human-readable steps to obtain and lay out the audio locally, if not a simple direct download.

tags.description: Free tags for search/filter only; never affect the benchmark definition.
